## Meeting Purpose

[Discussing Marcel's rapidly growing business and strategies for scaling the team.](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's business has taken off with 9 clients and 11 more in the pipeline, including a major deal with Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [He needs to scale the team strategically with a mix of full-time, offshore, and freelance roles](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Finding the right talent who are committed, eager to learn, and excited about AI/automation is key](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Richard shared insights from his experience building and managing teams](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Business Growth

  - [9 clients currently, 11 more in the pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Closed major deal with Ramp (worth $7B) to provide training workshops, content, and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Trying to scale the business by hiring strategists to own accounts and mix of full-time, offshore, freelance roles](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Brought on Jimmy from first workshop to help with accounts while keeping day job](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)

### Scaling Strategies

  - [Need people committed long-term but can't afford high salaries for everyone](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Considering full-time strategists vs. having more fractional/freelance support](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)
  - [Looking for talent excited about AI/automation who are willing to learn](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Opportunity to work with top companies like Ramp can attract talent](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)

### Richard's Team Building Experience

  - [Trained team leads to handle recruiting/vetting so he's not the bottleneck](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Created processes they could follow and improve upon](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Hired specialists but focused on developing existing team's skills](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Suggests building up 1-2 people Richard trusts to serve as general managers](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Compensation Considerations

  - [Richard's total comp around $200K, very high for Brazil market](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Marcel open to referrals/finders fees for strong talent](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [Flexible on full-time vs fractional roles for right candidates](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Richard to think about getting involved fractionally while keeping current role](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
  - [Marcel to add Richard to Slack channel to continue discussing](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
  - [Marcel continuing to recruit for roles, open to referrals](https://fathom.video/share/3NeBzBTK2MxyvjxSyJeSciDBuyNf2EhT?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
